revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 22 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 22 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月22日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]5年（[[1189年]]_月_日） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (元号)|天和]]3年（[[1683年]]_月_日） - 姦通の罪で京都烏丸の大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛が処刑。[[井原西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』巻三などの題材に * [[明治]]元年（[[1868年]]_月_日） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が鶴ヶ城を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（[[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月21日 (旧暦)|9月21日]] 翌日[[9月23日 (旧暦)|9月23日]] - 前月[[8月22日 (旧暦)|8月22日]] 翌月[[10月22日 (旧暦)|10月22日]] *新暦[[9月22日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月22日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1796年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}
[[Category:japanese lunar calendar]][[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Japanese Lunar Calendar]]

== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1796年]]）

{{Lunar September}} '''Lunar September22日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。

'''September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 22'''<!--Lunar September22--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。

'''September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 22'''<!--Lunar September22--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== Events == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏

== Deaths == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1796年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

{{Lunar September}} '''September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 22'''<!--Lunar September22--> is the Nth day of [[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
== Events == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1796年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

--> == Events == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== Births == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== Deaths == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[安永]]2年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1773年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1796年]]）

revision.text:
[[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}元年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}}, opened his castle (【Tsurugajo】) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}}, the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}元年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}} {{citation needed}} [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月廿二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月廿二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[Category:Lunar September]] {{citation needed}} {{citation needed}} [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月廿二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Days 22 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月廿二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]

[[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}}5年（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}3年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}}, opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}}) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}5年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}}, the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2年（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

[[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}}, the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}}5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}}） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}}3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}}） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}}1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}}） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}}, opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}}) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}}5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}}, the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}}1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}}） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}}, the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}}). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}}2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}}） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}}, the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}}).

[[sn:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .

This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ).

[[sn:September 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ).

== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ).

[[sn:September 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ). == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

[[sn:September 22 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 22일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] [[zh:九月初二]] [[en:draft:September 22 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ).

revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Bunji|ja|文治}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1189|ja|1189}} {{ill|November 2|ja|11月2日}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|ja|源頼朝}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1683|ja|1683}} {{ill|November 10|ja|11月10日}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1868|ja|1868}} {{ill|November 6|ja|11月6日}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|ja|松平容保}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|ja|嘉永}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1852|ja|1852}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治天皇}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|ja|1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|ja|応長}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1311|ja|1311}} {{ill|November 3|ja|11月3日}} ） – {{ill|Hojo Ujitoki|ja|北条師時}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|ja|1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1773|ja|1773}} {{ill|October 22|ja|10月22日}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|ja|1796}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]]
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月廿二]] ==References== {{reflist}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月22日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[寛政]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1796年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1773年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

Adding this in to start before replacing it with what I actually want

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月22日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[寛政]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1796年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1773年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[9月22日 (旧暦)]] to [[September 22 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月22日'''は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の22日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[文治]]5年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1189年]][[11月2日]]） - [[源頼朝]]が、[[奥州藤原氏]]討伐に功績のあった葛西清重を[[奥州総奉行]]に任命。奥州支配を確立 * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]3年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1683年]][[11月10日]]） - 京都の[[おさん茂兵衛|大経師の妻おさんと手代茂兵衛]]が姦通のため処刑。[[井原西鶴|西鶴]]『[[好色五人女]]』や[[近松門左衛門|近松]]『[[大経師昔暦]]』の題材。 * [[明治]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1868年]][[11月6日]]） - [[会津藩]]主・[[松平容保]]が[[若松城|鶴ヶ城]]を開城。会津藩が官軍に降伏
== 誕生日 == * [[嘉永]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1852年]][[11月3日]]） - [[明治天皇]]、122代[[天皇]]（+ [[1912年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[応長]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[1311年]][[11月3日]]） - [[北条師時]]、[[鎌倉幕府]]10代執権（* [[1275年]]） * [[寛政]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1796年]][[10月22日]]） - [[田沼意明]]、初代[[陸奥下村藩|陸奥下村藩主]]（* [[1773年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922}}

revision.text:
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840122]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 22|qq=September 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|qq=|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|qq=|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|qq=|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922|qq=}}

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|qq=|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|qq=|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|qq=|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|qq=|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|qq=|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|qq=|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|qq=|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|qq=|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).
== See Also ==

This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿二]][[zh:九月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840122]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 22|qq=September 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿二]][[zh:九月廿二]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840122]] Wikidata name: 22nd day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:13, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 22|qq=September 22}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922|qq=}}

This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * [[:en:Bunji (era)|Bunji]] 5th year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1189|1189]] [[:en:November 2|November 2]] ） – [[:en:Minamoto no Yoritomo|Minamoto no Yoritomo]] appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1683|1683]] [[:en:November 10|November 10]] ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 1st year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1868|1868]] [[:en:November 6|November 6]] ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, [[:en:Matsudaira Katamori|Matsudaira Katamori]] , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * [[:en:Kaei|Kaei]] 5th year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1852|1852]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – The future Emperor [[:en:Emperor Meiji|Meiji]] , the 122nd emperor († [[:en:1912|1912]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ōchō|Ōchō]] 1st year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1311|1311]] [[:en:November 3|November 3]] ） – [[:en:Hōjō Morotoki|Hojo Ujitoki]] , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* [[:en:1275|1275]] ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（[[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1773|1773]] [[:en:October 22|October 22]] ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* [[:en:1796|1796]] ).

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1189|en|1189|WD=Q19735|lt=1189}} {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1683|en|1683|WD=Q7651|lt=1683}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|en|Matsudaira Katamori|WD=Q569441|lt=Matsudaira Katamori}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Meiji}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3}} ） – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|en|Hōjō Morotoki|WD=Q2672978|lt=Hojo Ujitoki}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1773|en|1773|WD=Q7692|lt=1773}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922|qq=}}
