revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿二]][[zh:九月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿二]][[zh:九月廿二]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 22 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月22日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 22일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 22 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月廿二]][[zh:九月廿二]]
{{Not to be confused with|September 22|qq=September 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1189|en|1189|WD=Q19735|lt=1189}} {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1683|en|1683|WD=Q7651|lt=1683}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|en|Matsudaira Katamori|WD=Q569441|lt=Matsudaira Katamori}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Meiji}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3}} ） – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|en|Hōjō Morotoki|WD=Q2672978|lt=Hojo Ujitoki}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1773|en|1773|WD=Q7692|lt=1773}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|21|9|23|8|22|10|9|0922|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|September 22|qq=September 22}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月廿二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 22일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 22''' is the 22nd day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} , the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . Its Rokuyō is {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} and its day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Bunji (era)|en|Bunji (era)|WD=Q1194415|lt=Bunji|1=Bunji (era)}} 5th year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1189|en|1189|WD=Q19735|lt=1189|1=1189}} {{ill|November 2|en|November 2|WD=Q2996|lt=November 2|1=November 2}} ） – {{ill|Minamoto no Yoritomo|en|Minamoto no Yoritomo|WD=Q242800|lt=Minamoto no Yoritomo|1=Minamoto no Yoritomo}} appointed {{ill|Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|ja|葛西清重|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōzaisei Kiyoshige|1=Kasai Kiyoshige|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11621006}} as the chief administrator (奥州総奉行), thereby consolidating control over Ōshu. * {{ill|Tenwa (Japan)|ja|天和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenwa (Japan)|1=Tenna (era)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442381}} 3rd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1683|en|1683|WD=Q7651|lt=1683|1=1683}} {{ill|November 10|en|November 10|WD=Q2988|lt=November 10|1=November 10}} ） – In Kyoto, the wife of the great Buddhist priest (大経師) – known as {{ill|O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja|おさんと手代茂兵衛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/O-san and Tedai Shigehei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} – was executed for adultery. This incident provided material for works such as {{ill|Nishikaze’s|ja|西鶴|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishikaze’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 井原西鶴|1=Ihara Saikaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q352561}} "Kōshoku Gonin Onna" and {{ill|Chikamatsu’s|ja|近松|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikamatsu’s|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近松門左衛門|1=Chikamatsu Monzaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q324986}} "Daikyōshi Mukireki". * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 1st year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1868|en|1868|WD=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} {{ill|November 6|en|November 6|WD=Q2992|lt=November 6|1=November 6}} ） – The lord of the Aizu domain, {{ill|Matsudaira Katamori|en|Matsudaira Katamori|WD=Q569441|lt=Matsudaira Katamori|1=Matsudaira Katamori}} , opened his castle ({{Tsurugajo|qq=}} ) by "opening the castle" ceremony; Aizu later surrendered to the imperial forces.
== Births == * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|WD=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 5th year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1852|en|1852|WD=Q7661|lt=1852|1=1852}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3|1=November 3}} ） – The future Emperor {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|WD=Q174231|lt=Meiji|1=Emperor Meiji}} , the 122nd emperor († {{ill|1912|en|1912|WD=Q2077|lt=1912|1=1912}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Ōchō|en|Ōchō|WD=Q1327136|lt=Ōchō|1=Ōchō}} 1st year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1311|en|1311|WD=Q5731|lt=1311|1=1311}} {{ill|November 3|en|November 3|WD=Q2995|lt=November 3|1=November 3}} ） – {{ill|Hōjō Morotoki|en|Hōjō Morotoki|WD=Q2672978|lt=Hojo Ujitoki|1=Hōjō Morotoki}} , the 10th shikken of the Kamakura shogunate (* {{ill|1275|en|1275|WD=Q5529|lt=1275|1=1275}} ). * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 2nd year（{{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1773|en|1773|WD=Q7692|lt=1773|1=1773}} {{ill|October 22|en|October 22|WD=Q2957|lt=October 22|1=October 22}} ） – {{ill|Tanuma Yoshinori|ja|田沼意明|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanuma Yoshinori|1=Tanuma Okiaki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6635782}} , the first lord of the Mutsu Shimomura domain (* {{ill|1796|en|1796|WD=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}} ).
